resources.string: Invite users to register for awards
The number of sharing rewards has been used up
Activity is not within the time frame
Failed to verify the cashback of live games
The game bonus period is empty
The required click frequency is not enough
Failed to send, the first charge activity is not open
Successful distribution, number of users successfully distributed-
User does not meet the event claiming conditions
Failed cell phone or email verification
Please do not enter duplicate invitation codes
Exceeded the limit of new redemption codes
The exchange code is a duplicate, please re-enter.
The exchange code does not meet the conditions, please re-enter.
Too many incorrect gift code attempts. Use suspended for 1 hour.
Please pass the Google reCAPTCHA human verification.
Please pass the TenDI Captcha human verification.
Please pass the Cloudflare Turnstile human verification.
The invitation bonus and first recharge gift pack activities do not support redirection.
Account is banned/frozen, please contact the administrator
The user is not bound to Google authenticator
The user is bound to Google authenticator
Super administrators do not need to bind Google authenticators
Platform fee information cannot be edited
The account has been banned/frozen, please contact the administrator
The amount on the spinning wheel is invalid.
The number of items on the spinning wheel cannot exceed 10.
Failed to generate pre-signed upload URL
Please upgrade the App to the latest version to continue the withdrawal operation
Failed to send SMS on the third party platform
The installation package does not exist
The number of withdrawals per day cannot be less than 2
The maximum quota must be greater than the minimum quota
The task is in progress, cannot create a new SMS marketing task
In-progress SMS marketing tasks cannot be deleted
Upload failed, please try again later
There is already a packaging progress in progress
At least one piece of data must be on
You can select up to 6 recommended area codes. Please cancel the recommendation before setting it up
You can select up to 6 recommended areas. Please cancel the recommendations before setting them again
Only a maximum of 10 domain names can be added at a time
Contains areas that cannot be edited
Failed to generate pre-signed upload URL
The number of characters entered exceeds the limit
The recharge channel does not exist
The recharge method does not exist
The recharge amount is too small
The recharge amount is too large
The payment method does not exist
Bank card number does not exist
The top-up platform does not exist
The default player group cannot be deleted
Target player group cannot be empty
The QR code link is empty
The opening time of the recharge method is illegal
The amount must be an integer multiple of 1000
The bank card has no IFSC code
The withdrawal amount is greater than or less than the limit amount
The user is forbidden to withdraw cash
The number of withdrawals exceeds the limit
The anchor and the family head do not match
Cannot withdraw cash for existing family anchors
The operation amount cannot be 0 or a negative number
The user is already an agent
The payment amount cannot be less than 1
The host account does not exist
Unable to query the data of the day
The key is incorrect, please contact the administrator
The withdrawal amount is too large
The current order is being submitted
The current payment channel is temporarily not supported
The payment amount cannot be less than 20000000
Failed to submit payment on behalf
The order has been completed or cancelled, and cannot be modified after rejection
It is being used in the deposit setting and cannot be deleted
The current order cannot be returned
Orders locked for more than two hours cannot be recovered
The host does not provide record query
The member account does not exist
Platform quota configuration is empty, please contact customer service
The digital wallet type does not exist, please contact the operation administrator
The digital wallet does not exist, please contact the operation administrator
The digital wallet address has been bound
A maximum of 5 digital wallets can be bound
The default digital wallet was switched successfully
The agent does not exist, please contact the operation administrator
The currency information of the depositor is incorrect, please contact the operation administrator
"Recharge on behalf of the recharger, the merchant's collection card does not exist"
Tourists are not allowed to withdraw cash
The order cannot be modified after it has been completed or cancelled
System is busy, please try again later
Order can only be paid once
The internal name of the deposit account is duplicated
The order is being processed, and can be returned after 1 hour
The card number can not start with 0
No records search for the family
Indonesian rupiah withdrawals do not support decimal points
At least one piece of data must be on
Only data within 60 days can be searched, and the search interval is 31 days
The system is settling, please try again later
Withdrawals are prohibited, please contact customer service
The amount does not match the channel settings
The channel limit has been exceeded
The channel currency does not match the order currency
The member nickname does not exist.
The number of characters entered exceeds the limit
The account is logged in remotely, please log in again!
The account is force changed area!
MG conversion amount must be a multiple of 10
The game platform is under maintenance
Network exception Please try again later
Failed to enter the game, please try again later
The game has been taken down
The version does not support this game, please download a new version
The user is not bound to Google authenticator
The user is bound to Google authenticator
Super administrators do not need to bind Google authenticators
Platform ID or name is wrong
Please select at least one query condition
The open area must contain the default area
The required top-up gold coins must be greater than the required top-up gold coins of the previous level
The top-up gold coins required for VIP must be less than the top-up gold coins required for the next level
The default invitation code cannot be deleted
The gift ratio must be worthwhile
Account number must start with a letter
The anchor family does not exist
Cannot operate resources of other platforms
Platform fee information cannot be edited
The anchor is to be certified
The on-air game does not exist
The host account does not exist
The anchor account has been blocked
Can only be modified every 24 hours
Toy price cannot be set to zero or empty
Please do not set it for too long, please reset it.
The award source is under using and cannot be disabled or deleted
Data has been updated. Refresh to proceed.
Only advanced anchors can be added.
Please log out first, then delete.
VIP requires too many coins to recharge. Maximum 20 digits.
Nickname length must be between 6 and 30 characters.
Nickname can only be changed once within 15 days.
Failed to generate pre-signed URL for upload.
Toy prices cannot be set to more than 16 digits
Toy Interactive Configuration Name already exists
Live room names cannot exceed 100 in length
Pop-up Configuration Names cannot exceed 50 in length
ID nhà phân phối hoặc tài khoản nhà phân phối không chính xác
The query time span cannot exceed two months.
The name of the top-up settings software is too long.
The jump link for the top-up settings is too long.
The playback end time cannot be less than the current time.
The gift amount is too large.
The anchor is to be certified
The on-air game does not exist
The host account does not exist
The anchor account has been blocked
Can only be modified every 24 hours
Toy prices cannot be set to zero or empty.
Please do not set the price for too long. Please reset it.
Can only be switched once in 30 minutes
The charge type is the same and cannot be switched
Carousel buttons with the same activity exist
The on-air game does not exist
Can only be modified every 24 hours
Cannot operate resources of other platforms
The room rate must be greater than 0
The number of buttons displayed in the same position has reached the limit
The anchor is to be certified
Subscription failed, please try again later
The Anchor has turned on PK or Voice chat,more exciting content please update the App to watch!
The Anchor has turned on interactive game,more exciting content please update the App to watch!
Please contact customer service if consumption is restricted!
The live broadcast room has been downloaded
There is only one transcoding for the line, no need to switch
Backup upload video stream address format error
Recharge is required to unlock. Event rewards can be used in the game.
H5 live stream timed out, backup upload video stream address does not exist
Backup upload video stream address expired
Backup upload video stream address configuration expired
IP is restricted, please contact customer service
The device number cannot be empty
Picture verification code cannot be empty
Frequent operation,please wait five minutes and try again
The account has been suspended, please contact the platform
The operation is too frequent, please log in again
The anchor family does not exist, please contact the platform
Registration in this area is not yet open
The first digit of the mobile phone number cannot be 0
Mobile phone number cannot be empty
The mobile phone verification code failed to be sent.
The registration type parameter cannot be empty
Phone number can not be blank
Access is denied, please turn off the proxy or VPN
Registration is not yet open, please contact customer service
ip already exists in the blacklist
The player is already a room manager
Cannot add invitation code to family account
The gift ratio must be worthwhile
The anchor family does not exist
The required top-up gold coins must be greater than the required top-up gold coins of the previous level
Please enter 6-15 digits (digital) mobile phone number
The maximum number of SMS messages sent today has been reached
Retrieve the password is not yet open, please contact customer service
You do not have permission to block users
If you receive multiple text messages, please contact customer service
The open area must contain the default area
Please contact master control customer service
The default invitation code cannot be deleted
The top-up gold coins required for VIP must be less than the top-up gold coins required for the next level
You need to reach VIP {0} to modify the avatar
The parent account does not exist
Unbound mobile number cannot be changed
The maximum number of emails sent today has been reached
If you receive multiple emails, please contact customer service
Too many requests, unable to request again today
Invalid email, please contact customer service
Invalid phone number, please contact customer service
Too many errors, please try in five minutes
Too many errors, please try again
Too many requests, please try again
The operation is too frequent, please try again in 30 minutes
Login failed, please contact customer service
Account number must start with a letter
Platform ID or name is wrong
The user did not scan the code
The operation failed, the operation cannot be performed on other platform players
Account is disabled, please contact administrator
User is not bound to Google dynamic password
The current IP operates frequently, please try again later
The area code is not open for registration
The anchor account has been blocked
The host account does not exist
Please select at least one query condition
Current IP/Device has reached the registration limit
Invalid account, please contact customer service
Please enter a password of 6-20 digits
Please enter 6-20 digits for your nickname
You can only change your nickname once within 15 days
Please enter 6~20 digits Combination Password(Numbers + Letters)
Failed to get the verification code, please contact customer service
"No photos found in the host's album."
"The number of images required to upload to the host's album exceeds the system limit."
"No photos found in the host's album."
User blocking or forbidden speech exception
Toy price cannot be set to zero or empty
The anchor has been broadcast, stop giving toys
Do not set for too long, please reset
Please contact customer service if consumption is restricted!
The anchor is off the air. Stop spinning the Roulette wheel.
Recharge is required to unlock. Event rewards can be used in the game.
The invitation bonus and first recharge gift pack activities do not support redirection.
Tap or pull up to load more
Prize period has been updated, bet lost
User does not exist, please log in again
Your account has been restricted from betting. Please contact customer service.
The order status has changed, please refresh the data
The odds are abnormal, this game has been cancelled
Your version is too low. Please update it first
This game is not currently supported
The bet amount is not in the range
The query time range is too large
The game has been taken down
Game rule is not be null
User blocking or forbidden speech exception
The anchor has been broadcast, stop giving toys
Please contact customer service if consumption is restricted!
The anchor is off the air. Stop spinning the Roulette wheel.
Caj originally required for unlocking and event rewards can be used in the game
Subscription failed, please try again later
Order has been won does not qualify for doubling
Order has not been drawn does not qualify for doubling
Order has been withdrawn does not qualify for doubling
Did not find an order that needs to be doubled
Did not find the prize period of the game that needs to be betted on
Betting on the game that has an anomalous Prize Period status
Betting time is out of the range of the Prize Period
Bet amount is out of range
Please do not double the same bonus period repeatedly
The account has been suspended, please contact the platform
Please enter 6-20 digits for your nickname
You can only change your nickname once within 15 days
Please contact master control customer service
The area code is not open for registration
You need to reach VIP {0} to modify the avatar
Mobile phone number cannot be empty
Invalid phone number, please contact customer service
Invalid email, please contact customer service
Frequent operation,please wait five minutes and try again
Picture verification code cannot be empty
The operation is too frequent, please try again in 30 minutes
The maximum number of SMS messages sent today has been reached
Frequent operation,please wait five minutes and try again
If you receive multiple text messages, please contact customer service
The maximum number of emails sent today has been reached
If you receive multiple emails, please contact customer service
Failed to get the verification code, please contact customer service
The digital wallet type does not exist, please contact the operation administrator
A maximum of 5 digital wallets can be bound
The digital wallet address has been bound
The default digital wallet was switched successfully
The recharge method does not exist
The recharge channel does not exist

The recharge amount is too large

The digital wallet does not exist, please contact the operation administrator
The system is settling, please try again later
The withdrawal amount is greater than or less than the limit amount
The user is forbidden to withdraw cash
System is busy, please try again later
The payment method does not exist
The top-up platform does not exist
The amount must be an integer multiple of 1000
Failed to generate pre-signed upload URL
Network anomaly, please try again later
Failed to access the game, please try again later
Too many incorrect gift code attempts, suspended for 1 hour
Redemption code does not meet requirements, please re-enter
This IP has already been claimed
This device has already been claimed
User type does not meet requirements
User does not meet event claim requirements
Unbound phone number cannot be changed
Unbound email address cannot be changed
Event is out of time range
Only one transcoder is available for the line; no switching is required
The number of characters entered exceeds the limit
The account is logged in remotely, please log in again!
%s number has been copied, jump to %s in 3 seconds. Please go to %s to contact the agent to complete the recharge
I confirm that I am 18 years of age or older and have read the {Terms of Service}
Do you agree to use the content currently shared on your network?
You do not meet the rules of this event
Whether to transfer the game amount?
Due to your bad actions, you are prohibited from watching the live broadcast!
Anchor has closed the Voice chat.
If you like me, follow me.
Anchor has turned on the Voice chat.
All content of the app will be changed
The app will restart and display the contents of the corresponding area
Press the return key again to exit
Login has expired, please log in again
No camera permission granted. Please enable it in Settings.
Save failed, please check your permission settings.
No storage permission, please go to the settings to open the permission
Failure to obtain floating window permissions will result in some features not working properly. You will need to manually authorize them on the settings page.
If you do not have floating window permissions, please enable them in the settings.
It is forbidden to use screenshots and screen recording functions, you will be blocked if you use it again!

"Withdrawal limit: After each deposit, the consumption amount is greater than or equal to the deposit amount to complete the audit. The audit list only displays the two data that passed the last audit."
"Finance is being checked The account is not received within 3~5 minutes, please contact customer service"
Go ahead and try it out
Balance not enough %s, conversion failed. Do you want to top up?
You can also bind %s bank cards,If you need to delete your bank card, please contact online customer service.
The length of the account opening point is 2-30 characters
Please check your bank information, incorrect information will cause withdrawal failure
The list will show example colors according to the odds after the rebate is set
You can also bind %s bank cards
If you need to delete your bank card, please contact online customer service
You can only add up to five bank cards
Single bet chips can only be 1,000 to 100,000,000
%s picture quality trial in progress, trial ends after %s
HD quality trial ends, log in to the platform to unlock higher definition live broadcasts
Do you want to end your Voice chat?
{nickname} has been set up as a room manager
The host has switched to a free room
The host has switched to a paid room
{nickname} has been banned by {operatorRole} {operatorNickname} for 10 minutes.
{nickname} placed a bet of {amount} in the {gameName}
You do not have permission to unmute
You have not set up a business card
Send message content cannot be empty
{nickname} has been banned and cannot be banned repeatedly
You need to reach VIP {chatLevel} to speak
The operation failed, and the operation cannot be performed on other platform players.
Congratulations to {playerNickname} for grabbing the red envelope of {amount}
You have successfully sent the business card
{nickname} has won {winName} in the roulette wheel drawing
Region detection abnormal, please switch region!
Please pay attention to check the digital wallet address, other currencies cannot be retrieved after transferring in!
Confirm your new personal identification number
Congratulations on receiving the gift pack

"1. This function allows you to query and transfer balances across all partnered game platforms. 2. If automatic transfer is enabled, the system will automatically transfer balances in and out upon entering or exiting a partnered game platform. 3. Before enabling automatic balance transfer, please manually transfer any balances from partnered game platforms back to your account. 4. The transfer-in ratio is: 1 account currency = the equivalent amount of partnered game coins. 5. The transfer-out ratio is: 1 partnered game coin = the equivalent amount of account currency."
Kaiyuan chess and card balance is being recovered, please wait...
The error message has been copied, please contact customer service
You have bound %s wallets, and you can bind %s more wallets. For the safety of your funds, digital wallets cannot be deleted or modified.
Double your bet, double your profit
Double bet has been turned off
Double bet has been turned on
Failed to double your bet! Please try again
The anchor has not received the gift
Failed to get exchange rate data
Please contact the administrator for settlement
Unbound cell phone number/email? %s to retrieve
Follow and unfollow, an interval of 3 seconds
The game is closed, no bets
There is no balance in the current game
Are you sure to exit the game?
Percentage of Banker, Player and Tie wins in the last 50 games
Percentage of 0, 1~4 and ＞4 in the last 50 games
Percentage of Meron, Wala and Tie wins in the last 50 games
Percentage of Dragon, Tiger and Tie wins in the last 50 games
This game is not currently supported in the region
Total bet amount:%s Total win amount: %s
You submitted too fast, you can submit again after 5 seconds
This kind of gameplay is not yet open!
Choose at least one number for each position of the duplex
Only eight numbers can be selected
Special code three packs must choose three numbers
Support %s quality in live broadcast, upgrade %s to unlock it.

"Dear user, thank you for your continued support!
In order to better protect your rights and comply with regulatory requirements, by logging in/registering to use this app, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and agree to our "Terms of Service.
No more, the lottery records are only kept for three months
Enter your new personal identification number

"1. Due to risk control, users have false information, cheating, and malicious attacks. This platform will take measures including but not limited to canceling event rewards and prohibiting participation in events. In severe cases, it will be banned and will not be notified. 2. If the mobile phone number, bank account number, terminal device number, IP address and other information under different user accounts are the same or can be reasonably displayed as one user, they are all regarded as the same user. 3. The platform will make changes or adjustments to the rules of this event according to the actual situation of the event, and the relevant changes or adjustments will be announced in the rules of the event. 4. The platform is not responsible for any errors in the activity rewards caused by malicious attacks or tampering by third parties through technical means. 5. During the event, the platform will not be held responsible for the user’s inability to participate in the event or failure to participate in the event due to improper operation of the user or network failure in the user’s area, failure of the telecommunications operator and other reasons beyond the control of the platform."
Earn promotional commissions and game rebates from {gameRebate}
"After deleting the invitation code, the invitation code will not be able to register again"

"The platform uses technical means and manual review to review the number of friends invited. The existence of false information, cheating, and malicious attacks are judged to be invalid. The number of effective friends is displayed with a delay of 30 minutes to 60 minutes. This platform will take measures including but not limited to canceling event rewards and banning participation in events. In severe cases, it will be banned and no further notice will be given."
Invite the 20 friends to get 3,000,000 gold coins
If you cannot open the QR code, please enter the following URL in your browser
Cannot exceed the maximum rebate value
For every %s bucks consumed by the lower level, they will get %s money
Please set a rebate for the subordinate
Sorry, but you are unable to access and use this site due to local regulations in your area.
The streamer is currently using this reward source and cannot disable or delete it.
The data has been updated. Please refresh to proceed.
Gift/Interact with the host and get cash prizes!
This is already the first live stream.
This is the last live stream.
Roulette Wheel Draw is now open, spin the wheel and interact with the anchor
%s/bout Spin the wheel and anchor interacts with the content randomly pointed to by the wheel
You have already participated in this event
Confirm to exit the live broadcast room?
You can find the contact information again in the anchor details page
The barrage is disconnected and reconnecting
Cannot connect to the barrage, please re-enter the live broadcast room
This room is a chargeable room
Reminder: Charges for paid rooms will be deducted every 10 minutes
Note: Paid rooms are charged once every %s
This room is a paid room, with %s seconds left in the preview time
Follow and unfollow, an interval of 30 seconds
Enter the number of gifts (up to 9999)
Please enter the correct number of gifts
You will give the current anchor %s %s
The account balance is insufficient, please ensure that the balance is sufficient and watch
If the live stream fails to play properly, you can try again.
Unlock more exciting content by logging into the platform
"You are late, the red envelopes have been distributed continue to cheer next time"

"Reminder: If the amount of gifts sent in the live broadcast room reaches the specified target within the specified time, the red envelope reward will be triggered. The amount of red envelopes is related to the number of people in the live broadcast room and the amount of gifts"

"Reminder: If the bet amount in the live broadcast room reaches the specified target within the specified time, the red envelope reward will be triggered. The amount of red envelopes is related to the number of people in the live broadcast room and the amount of bets."
You need to reach VIP %s before you can speak
Swipe right to clear the screen
The free room is being switched, and there will be no more charges after the switch. Are you sure to switch?
The host has switched to pay, and the remaining preview is 15s
The host has switched to a free room and will no longer be charged.
"Swipe up and down Switch live broadcast"
Invite friends to watch for free
Paid room, end of preview time
Congratulations to %s for winning a prize in %s
The account or password you entered is incorrect
You can log in with your mobile phone number
You can sign in with your email
For more features, please log in and operate
You are currently logged in for your account
Password modification, please contact customer service
Sign in or register to agree
Account number cannot be a pure number
Network test failed, please check the network situation...
Refresh too frequently, please try again in 10 seconds
Failure to obtain storage permissions will cause some functions to be unusable, and you need to go to the settings page to manually authorize
Tip: If you do not receive the email, please check your junk mailbox
Conversion balance is less than %s, conversion failed. Please change the conversion amount
Currency not bound, please contact customer service
When not joining a camp, the interactive game system will automatically assign a camp if you like or place a bet.
The input amount is formatted incorrectly
Only the host can invite users into the group
Please select the start time first
Please set the correct query time
Please go to %s to contact the agent to complete the deposit
After selecting the bank card for transfer, submit the order
Important reminder: The payment channel will be changed from time to time. Please check and confirm the latest account before depositing the funds before making the remittance.
"Reminder: Single payment %s-%s, if the payment channel cannot be deposited, please choose another channel."
Deposit %s to get %s, the highest to get %s
Please transfer to the following bank card first, then submit the order, the background prompts instructions
Please deposit before submitting the order
The deposit amount cannot be empty
Payment channel is unavailable, please switch payment channel
Failed to load the top-up channel
The deposit account has been copied
Please select the receiving bank card
Delivers content tailored to your interests
Enables instant access to take photos for profile picture setup.
Provides online live streaming services with hosts
Delivers important platform updates (event rewards, system announcements, host messages)
Pushes critical platform information during app usage (event rewards, system announcements, host messages)
Anchor has disabled PK anchor voice
Successful operation, please log in again
Please add a digital wallet first

"1. Commission: The commission value of the rebate for inviting valid users. 2. Taxation: After inviting the user, the user can play the game, which can bring you tax. Part of the game is the day before the settlement is made between 7 and 9 o'clock in the morning. 3. The tax rate will change in real time, please contact customer service for details. 4. Taxes less than 0.01 yuan will not be calculated"
%s picture quality switching failed, replay %s picture quality
The real name is 2-40 characters long
There is no deposit method available.
Recharge is required to unlock. Event rewards can be used in the game.
No more, transaction records are only kept for six months
Get up to {inviteCashback} invitation cashback and {gameRebate} game rebate

Please confirm your email is correct
Please make sure your phone number is correct
Enter your email to sign up a new account
This area code is not open
Enter your phone number to get a verification code
Enter your email to get a verification code

Please enter account number or nickname to query
Please ensure that your PINDS match
"The default PIN password is 0000 withdrawal, be sure to remember!"
PIN password can only be 4 digits
Please enter a password of 6-20 digits
Please enter 6~20 digits Combination Password(Numbers + Letters)
Please enter 6~20 digits Combination Password(Numbers + Letters)
After this time, if your account is not online, all your data will be deleted.
After switching the language, you need to restart the APP, are you sure to restart
App PIN can only be 4 digits
You need to reach VIP%s to modify the avatar
After the above content is modified, it cannot be modified again

Verification code has been sent to

"Verification code has been sent
Please note that SMS interception information or spam"

Click on the picture to try again
Account not registered, will be automatically registered
The account is not bound to a mobile phone number
Automatically return to the original interface after two seconds
You clicked too fast, you can click again after 0.5 seconds
You clicked too fast, you can click again after 2 seconds
The content can not be blank
Mobile phone number/account cannot be empty
Account is abnormal, please log in again
The picture is loading, please wait
Login expired, please log in again
Failed to load data, click to try again
The network is abnormal, please check the network
Zalo is not installed, please use it after installation.
Alipay is not installed, please use it after installation.
Messenger is not installed, please use it after installation.
QQ is not installed, please use it after installation.
The app is not installed, please try it later
WeChat is not installed, please use it after installation.
"You haven't configured your email account yet, do you want to jump to the email configuration now?"
Too many times to get the verification code
Visit too frequently, please enter the verification code
The current account is a tourist account, please bind your mobile phone number or email to enjoy more services
Please bind your mobile phone number or email to enjoy more services
Please upload a screenshot of 【Transfer Successfully】to facilitate quick financial verification.
The uploaded file cannot be empty
Your microphone privileges are not enabled, please enable microphone privileges in settings
Anchor has turned off your microphone
Anchor has turned on your microphone
Anchor has ended your Voice chat
Mobile phone number is not bound
The content must be pure numbers
Please fill in %s. After saving, you cannot modify it again.
The length of the real name cannot exceed 40 digits
The length of the QQ number cannot exceed 15 digits
To change your mobile phone number, please contact customer service
You can only change your nickname once within 15 days
The length of the nickname cannot exceed 30 characters
Please enter 6-20 digits for your nickname
The length of the contact number cannot exceed 20 digits
The length of the real name must be between 2 and 40 characters
Has been locked and cannot be modified
Please confirm to change your email.
Please confirm to change your mobile number.
Please enter the verification code sent to %s
Cell phone/email not available, please contact customer service
In order to protect the security of your account, we need to verify your identity
The minimum withdrawal amount is %s, the highest is %s
The actual withdrawal amount is less than the minimum withdrawal standard
System settlement in progress, please try again later
If the withdrawal amount exceeds the withdrawal limit, part of the amount will be deducted from the handling fee. Are you sure?
The withdrawal amount is greater than the balance
The withdrawal amount is greater than the maximum withdrawal standard
The withdrawal amount is less than the minimum withdrawal standard
Please bind the bank card first
Please enter the withdrawal amount or gold coins
Finance is being checked, please wait patiently
Enter more than the maximum withdrawal currency
There is currently no withdrawal method, please contact customer service
Enter less than the minimum withdrawal currency
Enter less than the minimum withdrawal amount
The minimum withdrawal amount is %s, the maximum is %s
In order to improve the withdrawal efficiency and limit the number of daily withdrawals by users, the remaining number of withdrawals today is
Choose the bank card to withdraw
